focus: Inventory corpus shape, quantify representative token/document characteristics, and map artifacts to sk-design hub and mode contracts

summary: Each measured style is a complete six-artifact bundle with sharply different artifact context costs.

summary: DESIGN.md preserves coherent identity while design-tokens.json supports deterministic field-level retrieval.
All 977 token files parsed, and 961 shared one of three dominant top-level schemas.
Hub and mode contracts require mode-specific hydration rather than a universal style payload.
Representative provenance records source and capture metadata but not an explicit license field.
evidence: [SOURCE: .opencode/skills/sk-design/styles/kobu/source.md:3-12] [INFERENCE: no rights conclusion is safe from the representative metadata alone]

direction: Direct-child directory count as style count
